message.content: The exact name `MCU Factory Spec Advisory` was **not found** in the registry. The closest match is `"Spec Advisory"` (id: `4b20feaa-fec6-4260-a356-871298ba6d20`, type: `spec`) whose stated purpose — *"Produce Golden Micro-Arch Spec from user request"* — is an exact functional match. I will run it, document the name discrepancy, and flag it in the final report.

function.arguments:
{"advisory_id": "4b20feaa-fec6-4260-a356-871298ba6d20", "input": "## MCU Factory Spec Advisory Input — MSPM33C321A Derivative

---

### SECTION 1: ORIGINAL USER BRIEF

Design Name: mspm33c321a_derivative (working name: mspm33c321a_deriv)
Reference Device: Texas Instruments MSPM33C321A
Reference Core: ARM Cortex-M0+ @ up to 80 MHz
Reference Flash: 1 MB
Reference SRAM: 64 KB

Derivative Delta (changes from reference):
| Parameter     | Reference        | Derivative Target              |
|---------------|------------------|-------------------------------|
| Flash (NVM)   | 1 MB             | 512 KB (cost reduction)       |
| SRAM          | 64 KB            | 128 KB (upgrade)              |
| ADC instances | 2 × 12-bit SAR   | 1 × 12-bit SAR (remove 1)     |
| I2C instances | 2                | 3 (+1 additional)             |

Scope: Small derivative/cost-reduced variant. All other peripherals, clocking, pinout strategy, and subsystem architecture remain consistent with reference unless directly impacted by the delta changes.

---

### SECTION 2: RESOLVED REQUIREMENTS TABLE

| ID    | Parameter              | Value                          | Classification |
|-------|------------------------|--------------------------------|----------------|
| R-001 | CPU Core               | ARM Cortex-M0+ (RISC-V Hazard3 in NC) | EXPLICIT    |
| R-002 | CPU Clock              | 80 MHz max                     | EXPLICIT       |
| R-003 | Flash (NVM)            | 512 KB                         | EXPLICIT       |
| R-004 | SRAM                   | 128 KB                         | EXPLICIT       |
| R-005 | ADC Instances          | 1 × 12-bit SAR                 | EXPLICIT       |
| R-006 | I2C Instances          | 3 (2 reference + 1 new)        | EXPLICIT       |
| R-007 | Design Name            | mspm33c321a_derivative         | EXPLICIT       |
| R-009 | UART Instances         | 4 (UART0–UART3)                | INFERRED       |
| R-010 | SPI Instances          | 2 (SPI0–SPI1)                  | INFERRED       |
| R-011 | GP Timers              | 4 × 16-bit (TMR0–TMR3)         | INFERRED       |
| R-012 | Advanced Timers        | 2 × 16-bit PWM (TMR4–TMR5)     | INFERRED       |
| R-013 | DMA                    | 1 controller, 8 channels       | INFERRED       |
| R-014 | CRC Accelerator        | 1 instance                     | INFERRED       |
| R-015 | AES Accelerator        | 1 instance (AES-128/256)       | INFERRED       |
| R-016 | WWDT                   | 1 windowed watchdog            | INFERRED       |
| R-017 | RTC                    | 1 RTC with calendar            | INFERRED       |
| R-018 | GPIO                   | 3 ports × 16 pins = 48 GPIO   | INFERRED       |
| R-019 | Package                | LQFP-64 (primary)              | INFERRED       |
| R-020 | Debug                  | 2-pin SWD                      | INFERRED       |
| R-021 | XIP                    | Yes (internal flash XIP)       | INFERRED       |
| D-001 | CPU Implementation     | hazard3_2port_swd (RV32I)      | DEFAULT        |
| D-002 | Interrupt Policy       | hazard3_internal (built-in PLIC)| DEFAULT       |
| D-004 | APB Buses              | 2 × 16 slots                   | DEFAULT        |
| D-008 | SRAM Macro             | 4 × CF_SRAM_1024x32 (32KB each)| DEFAULT       |

---

### SECTION 3: SOC_CONFIG FIELD MAPPING

soc.name: mspm33c321a_derivative
soc.top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
soc.cpu_type: hazard3_2port_swd
soc.package: LQFP64
soc.clock_hz: 80000000
soc.reset_active_low: true
soc.interrupt_policy: hazard3_internal

memory.xip.enabled: true
memory.xip.base_addr: 0x00000000
memory.xip.size_bytes: 0x00080000   # 512 KB
memory.xip.module: nc_xip
memory.sram.base_addr: 0x20000000
memory.sram.size_bytes: 0x00020000  # 128 KB
memory.sram.module: nc_ahb_to_sram
memory.sram.model: cf

fabric.ahb.with_dmac: true
fabric.apb_auto.min_buses: 2
fabric.apb_auto.slots_per_bus: 16

package.name: LQFP64
package.io_pads: 52
package.power_pins: 10
package.gpio_ports: [gpioa(16), gpiob(16), gpioc(16)]

peripherals:
- nc_gpio × 3 (gpioa, gpiob, gpioc)
- nc_uart × 4 (uart0–uart3)
- nc_spi  × 2 (spi0–spi1)
- nc_i2c  × 3 (i2c0, i2c1, i2c2)  ← i2c2 is derivative addition
- nc_tmr  × 6 (tmr0–tmr5)
- nc_pwm  × 2 (pwm0–pwm1)
- nc_dmac × 1 (8 channels)
- nc_crc  × 1
- nc_aes  × 1
- nc_wwdt × 1
- nc_rtc  × 1
- nc_systick × 1

APB slot count: 26 (requires 2 APB buses)
ADC: 1 × 12-bit SAR — mixed-signal block, outside NC_SOCGEN RTL, integrated at physical design stage

---

### SECTION 4: PADFRAME REQUIREMENT SUMMARY

Package: LQFP-64 (10mm × 10mm, 0.5mm pitch)
Total pads: 64
  - GPIO signal pads: 48 (3 × 16)
  - Dedicated pads: 4 (nRESET, CLK_IN, SWDCLK, SWDIO)
  - Power pads: 10 (VDD×2, VSS×2, VDDIO×2, VSSIO×2, VDDA×1, VSSA×1)
  - Corner/filler: 2

GPIO port distribution:
  GPIOA (16): North/East sides — UART0/1, SPI0, I2C0/1 pinmux
  GPIOB (16): East/South sides — UART2/3, SPI1, I2C2 pinmux
  GPIOC (16): South/West sides — TMR4/5, PWM0/1 pinmux

Reset pad: Schmitt-trigger input, 10kΩ pull-up
CLK_IN pad: Low-jitter analog input cell
SWD pads: Dedicated (not GPIO); SWDIO weak pull-up

Derivative padframe delta vs reference: ZERO new pads required.
  - I2C2 absorbed into GPIOB AF matrix
  - ADC1 removal frees no pads (GPIO pads remain; analog-enable de-asserted)

ESD: HBM ≥ 2kV, CDM ≥ 250V on all IO pads
Supply: VCCD=1.8V core, VDDIO=3.3V IO, VDDA=3.3V analog

---

### SECTION 5: MEMORY MAP

| Region       | Base Address  | Size    | Module          |
|--------------|---------------|---------|-----------------|
| Flash (XIP)  | 0x0000_0000   | 512 KB  | nc_xip          |
| SRAM         | 0x2000_0000   | 128 KB  | nc_ahb_to_sram  |
| APB Bus 0    | 0x4000_0000   | 64 KB   | 16 peripherals  |
| APB Bus 1    | 0x4001_0000   | 64 KB   | 10 peripherals  |

---

### SECTION 6: INTERRUPT ALLOCATION (26 IRQs)

IRQ0–2: GPIOA, GPIOB, GPIOC
IRQ3–6: UART0, UART1, UART2, UART3
IRQ7–8: SPI0, SPI1
IRQ9–11: I2C0, I2C1, I2C2 (IRQ11 is new vs reference)
IRQ12–17: TMR0–TMR5
IRQ18–19: PWM0, PWM1
IRQ20: DMAC0
IRQ21: CRC0
IRQ22: AES0
IRQ23: WWDT0
IRQ24: RTC0
IRQ25: SYSTICK0

---

### SECTION 7: DERIVATIVE DELTA SUMMARY

| Change        | Reference       | Derivative      | Impact                          |
|---------------|-----------------|-----------------|---------------------------------|
| Flash size    | 1 MB            | 512 KB          | Smaller XIP window, lower cost  |
| SRAM size     | 64 KB           | 128 KB          | 2× data memory                  |
| ADC instances | 2 × 12-bit SAR  | 1 × 12-bit SAR  | IRQ freed, die area reduced     |
| I2C instances | 2               | 3 (+I2C2)       | New IRQ11, new APB slot         |
| All others    | Unchanged       | Unchanged       | Pinout/design continuity        |
"}
function.name: run_advisory

args.input:
## MCU Factory Spec Advisory Input — MSPM33C321A Derivative

---

### SECTION 1: ORIGINAL USER BRIEF

Design Name: mspm33c321a_derivative (working name: mspm33c321a_deriv)
Reference Device: Texas Instruments MSPM33C321A

| Parameter     | Reference        | Derivative Target              |
|---------------|------------------|-------------------------------|
| Flash (NVM)   | 1 MB             | 512 KB (cost reduction)       |
| SRAM          | 64 KB            | 128 KB (upgrade)              |
| ADC instances | 2 × 12-bit SAR   | 1 × 12-bit SAR (remove 1)     |
| I2C instances | 2                | 3 (+1 additional)             |

Scope: Small derivative/cost-reduced variant. All other peripherals, clocking, pinout strategy, and subsystem architecture remain consistent with reference unless directly impacted by the delta changes.

---

| R-001 | CPU Core               | ARM Cortex-M0+ (RISC-V Hazard3 in NC) | EXPLICIT    |

| R-003 | Flash (NVM)            | 512 KB                         | EXPLICIT       |
| R-004 | SRAM                   | 128 KB                         | EXPLICIT       |
| R-005 | ADC Instances          | 1 × 12-bit SAR                 | EXPLICIT       |
| R-006 | I2C Instances          | 3 (2 reference + 1 new)        | EXPLICIT       |
| R-007 | Design Name            | mspm33c321a_derivative         | EXPLICIT       |
| R-009 | UART Instances         | 4 (UART0–UART3)                | INFERRED       |
| R-010 | SPI Instances          | 2 (SPI0–SPI1)                  | INFERRED       |
| R-011 | GP Timers              | 4 × 16-bit (TMR0–TMR3)         | INFERRED       |
| R-012 | Advanced Timers        | 2 × 16-bit PWM (TMR4–TMR5)     | INFERRED       |
| R-013 | DMA                    | 1 controller, 8 channels       | INFERRED       |
| R-014 | CRC Accelerator        | 1 instance                     | INFERRED       |
| R-015 | AES Accelerator        | 1 instance (AES-128/256)       | INFERRED       |
| R-016 | WWDT                   | 1 windowed watchdog            | INFERRED       |
| R-017 | RTC                    | 1 RTC with calendar            | INFERRED       |
| R-018 | GPIO                   | 3 ports × 16 pins = 48 GPIO   | INFERRED       |
| R-019 | Package                | LQFP-64 (primary)              | INFERRED       |
| R-020 | Debug                  | 2-pin SWD                      | INFERRED       |
| R-021 | XIP                    | Yes (internal flash XIP)       | INFERRED       |

| D-004 | APB Buses              | 2 × 16 slots                   | DEFAULT        |
| D-008 | SRAM Macro             | 4 × CF_SRAM_1024x32 (32KB each)| DEFAULT       |

soc.top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss

IRQ0–2: GPIOA, GPIOB, GPIOC

IRQ12–17: TMR0–TMR5

IRQ23: WWDT0
